name: @smithy-hono/adapter-aws
description: AWS (DynamoDB + Secrets Manager) runtime adapter for @smithy-hono/security-core. Implements the four storage interfaces (strongly-consistent rate-limit + nonce via DynamoDB conditional writes / CAS) plus platform glue (forwarded-proto / client-IP resolvers, CloudWatch console logger) over narrow structural ports — no @aws-sdk at runtime (ARCH-01).

//optionalPeerDependencies.@aws-sdk/client-dynamodb: Install ONLY in the consumer Lambda/service. This package speaks to DynamoDB through the narrow structural DynamoSendLike port (a `{ send(command): Promise<any> }` shape) and intentionally does NOT depend on the SDK, so it typechecks and tests with root-hoisted tooling only.
//optionalPeerDependencies.@aws-sdk/lib-dynamodb: Install in the consumer if using DynamoDBDocumentClient (recommended — native JS values, no AttributeValue marshalling). Satisfies DynamoSendLike directly.
//optionalPeerDependencies.@aws-sdk/client-secrets-manager: Install in the consumer for SecretProvider. This package speaks to Secrets Manager through the structural SecretsSourceLike port; wire SecretsManagerClient.send(new GetSecretValueCommand(...)) behind it.
